title: Self-Consistent Field Theory (SCFT)
source_data_quality_note: Source MD is widefield-fluorescence template (fan-out artifact). Physics below is grounded in canonical literature for this principle.

E.description: SCFT maps polymer chains to modified diffusion equations for propagators q(r,s); mean-field free energy F[w, phi] is minimized self-consistently; morphology emerges from competition between chi_AB * N and entropy.
E.forward_model: dq/ds = (b^2/6) Laplacian(q) - w(r) q;  phi_A(r) = integral_0^f q(r,s) q*(r,1-s) ds;  w_A(r) = chi_AB * N * phi_B(r); F = -Q + (1/V) integral [chi_AB*N*phi_A*phi_B - w_A*phi_A - w_B*phi_B] dr
E.world_state_x: 3D composition fields phi_A(r), phi_B(r) representing block copolymer morphology (lamellae, cylinders, gyroid, BCC spheres)
E.observation_y: Scattering: structure factor S(q) with peaks at q*, q*sqrt(3), q*sqrt(4) for lamellae/gyroid; TEM images; small-angle neutron/X-ray scattering

W.regime: Multiple local minima (lamellae, gyroid, hexagonal) → non-unique inversion; phase diagram navigation requires morphology seeding.

C.solver_class: Anderson-mixing SCFT on Fourier grid; morphology-conditioned Monte Carlo
C.error_bound: |F_hat - F|_2 bounded by grid discretization error (h^4 for 4th-order diffusion) + mixing convergence tolerance
C.complexity: O(N_s * N_grid * log(N_grid)) per SCFT iteration
